In review

  • Skinner, D. T., C. Robbins, G. N. Inglis, M. Joshi, P. Langdon, A. J. Matthews, M. Peaple, T. J. Osborn, and D. A. Sear; Decadal-scale drivers of South Pacific hydroclimate variability, Quarterly Journal of the Royal Meteorological Society.

2026

  • Skinner, D. T., H. Heidemann, and Y. Li; CMIP Community Workshop 2026, Weather.

  • Sear, D., M. Peaple, P. Langdon, D. T. Skinner, M. Joshi, A. J. Matthews, C. Hipkiss, T. J. Osborn, G. N. Inglis, and J. Sheffield; How did a changing climate in the tropical South Pacific contribute to the eastward migration and settlement of Polynesia? Journal of Pacific Archaeology, 16(2), 5.

  • Peaple, M., D. T. Skinner, G. N. Inglis, M. Joshi, P. Langdon, A. J. Matthews, T. J. Osborn, R. Scaife, J.-Y. Meyer, & D. Sear; Cooler and drier climate in the South–Central Pacific during the last glacial period Communications Earth & Environment, 7, 408.

2025

  • Skinner, D. T., M. Peaple, G. N. Inglis, M. Joshi, P. Langdon, A. J. Matthews, T. J. Osborn & D. Sear; Ocean variability drives a millennial-scale shift in South Pacific hydroclimate Communications Earth & Environment, 6 pp. 679.

  • Skinner, D. T., A. J. Matthews & Stevens, D.P.; Decadal variability of Madden–Julian oscillation teleconnections in a coupled climate model Quarterly Journal of the Royal Meteorological Society, 151(773) pp. e5071.

2024

  • Skinner, D. T.; Weather in my life: Daniel Skinner, Weather, 79(6) pp. 185.

2023

  • Skinner, D. T., A. J. Matthews, and D. P. Stevens; Decadal variability of the extratropical response to the Madden–Julian Oscillation, Geophysical Research Letters, 50 pp. e2023GL104576.

  • Skinner, D. T., and H. Mallinson; Spotlight on the Youth and Early Career Special Interest Group, Weather, 78(6) pp. 164–165.

  • Bloomfield, H., M. Wright, and D. T. Skinner; How the Royal Meteorological Society is engaging industry with Weather and Climate Science, The Geographer (Royal Scottish Geographical Society), Spring 2023 pp. 34–35.

  • Wright, M., D. T. Skinner, H. Bloomfield and H. Mallinson; RMetS Climate Change Forum 2022: A Vision for 2050 and Implications for Action, Weather, 78(4) pp. 117–119.

2022

  • Skinner, D. T., A. J. Matthews, and D. P. Stevens; North Atlantic Oscillation response to the Madden–Julian Oscillation in a coupled climate model, Weather, 77(6) pp. 201–205.
